name: Kraut Burgers (Bierochen)
recipeInstructions:
Or substitute your favorite 2 loaf bread dough recipe.
1. Preheat oven to 375°F (190°C).
2. Mix ground beef with onion in a bowl until well combined.
3. Add shortening and mix until the mixture is crumbly.
4. Gradually add the frozen bread dough, stirring until a dough forms.
5. Shred the cabbage and stir it into the dough.
6. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
7. Form the mixture into patties.
8. Place the patties on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
9. Bake for 20-25 minutes or until golden brown, turning off the heat before the minimum time specified.
